What We Do

Every brand touchpoint, handled under one roof.

From a single vinyl sticker to a full storefront transformation — our workshop and design team cover the complete advertising and decor lifecycle.

◧

Signage & Branding

Illuminated signs, 3D letters, shopfront fascia, wayfinding and lightboxes — designed and installed on site.

▤

Large Format Printing

Banners, vinyl wraps, window graphics, wall murals and exhibition graphics printed in-house.

◨

Interior Decor & Fit-Out

Office and retail fit-outs, partitioning, false ceilings, flooring and joinery, delivered on schedule.

▥

Corporate & Print

Stationery, brochures, packaging and promotional print for day-to-day business needs.

How We Work

From first call to final install, in four steps.

1

Consult & Survey

We visit your site or review your brief and scope the job accurately.

2

Design & Approve

Concepts and mockups shared for sign-off before anything is produced.

3

Produce

In-house printing, fabrication and materials sourcing — on schedule.

4

Install & Handover

Our team installs on site and walks you through the finished work.

Why Fajer Al Madina

One team for design, production and installation.

✓

In-house production

No outsourcing delays — printing and fabrication happen under our own roof.

✓

Site-ready installation team

Our own crew handles delivery and installation across Dubai and the UAE.

✓

Transparent quoting

Clear scope and pricing before work starts — no surprise add-ons.

✓

One point of contact

A single project lead follows your job from quote to handover.
